themes.theme_summary: Users are unhappy with the high brokerage fees charged by the app, which they feel is excessive and hinders their ability to trade effectively. They are requesting a reduction in these fees to make the app more competitive and user-friendly.
quotes: why do you need 20 rupees of brokerage in intraday? even 5 rupees will be enough for your profits
how will we do intraday when your brokerage is even higher than what we can earn by intraday
action_ideas: Review and adjust the brokerage fee structure to be more competitive with other trading apps
Consider offering tiered pricing or discounts for frequent traders
Provide more transparent and detailed information about the brokerage fees and how they are used

themes.theme_summary: The majority of users find the app easy to use and navigate, but one user had a severely negative experience with the company's business practices. The overall sentiment is positive, with many users praising the app's simplicity.
quotes: easy to use and simple UI
Very bad app. Please dont invest in this as this is a fraud company
action_ideas: Simplify the investment process further to reduce user friction
Improve customer support to address and resolve user complaints in a timely manner
Review and refine business practices to prevent fraudulent activities and ensure transparency

themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the users' experience with the trading app, including its features, usability, and potential issues. The core issue revolves around the app's functionality, user interface, and trustworthiness.
quotes: there will be a option in which we can make the wishlist of the stocks, but it has a limit of 10 wishlists, better lift that limit
cash segment nifty indication very small, please midium size so can we saw correct
user trading data share with opraters like hrti ptv ltd, nk security and others... when u buy they dump
action_ideas: Increase the wishlist limit for stocks to improve user experience
Optimize the cash segment nifty indication for better visibility
Investigate and address concerns about data sharing and potential scams

themes.theme_summary: Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges compared to other apps, which is affecting their investment decisions. The excessive fees are a major concern for both new and existing investors.
quotes: Brokerage is too High compared to other apps
action_ideas: Review and adjust brokerage fees to be more competitive with other apps
Provide transparent and clear information about the fees associated with each investment option
Consider offering discounts or promotions to loyal customers or high-volume investors

themes.theme_summary: Users are extremely satisfied with the app's trading and investment features, finding it easy to use and profitable. The overall sentiment is overwhelmingly positive, with many users considering it the best app for their investment needs.
quotes: best app for trading and easy to operate
best trading app I have earned 4 lakh from this app thank you
action_ideas: Continue to enhance and simplify the trading and investment features to maintain user satisfaction
Consider adding educational resources for beginners to further improve the user experience
Explore ways to expand the app's capabilities to meet the evolving needs of its user base
